problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: If Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
